section.div: Favorites genres: Comedy, Fantasy, Slice of Life, Adventure, Romance, Drama

div.div:
The adventure is over but life goes on for an elf mage just beginning to learn what living is all about. Elf mage Frieren and her courageous fellow adventurers have defeated the Demon King and brought peace to the land. But Frieren will long outlive the rest of her former party. How will she come to understand what life means to the people around her? Decades after their victory, the funeral of one her friends confronts Frieren with her own near immortality. Frieren sets out to fulfill the last wishes of her comrades and finds herself beginning a new adventure…
(Source: Crunchyroll)

Hinako lives alone by the sea, quietly drifting through life after losing her family years ago. One day, a mermaid named Shiori saves her from a monster and says she’s come to eat her—just not yet. Until then, Shiori will stay by her side and keep her safe. In that moment, a deep hope swells in Hinako: Maybe this girl can finally grant her the ending she’s been waiting for.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

At Dahlia Academy, a prestigious boarding school attended by students of two feuding countries—the eastern Nation of Touwa, and the Principality of West—Romio Inuzuka, leader of the dorms’ Touwa first-years, wishes for a romance that can never be. For his ladylove is none other than his arch-enemy, Juliet Persia, leader of the dorms’ West first-years! Is Inuzuka ready to risk it all to confess his feelings? And even if Persia somehow agrees to go out with them, how long can they keep a forbidden relationship under wraps?! (Source: Kodansha USA) Note: Includes two extra chapters.
Sasayaku You ni Koi wo Utau

Bubbly, energetic first-year high school student Himari falls head over heels for her senpai Yori after hearing her band perform on the first day of school. Himari tells Yori she just loves her, and to Himari's surprise, Yori says she loves Himari back! But when Himari realizes that she and her senpai are feeling two different kinds of love, she begins to ask herself what "love" really means... (Source: Kodansha USA) Notes: - Eighteenth place of Tsugimanga 2020 Award in the Manga Category - First place in Yuri Navi’s best Yuri Manga of 2020
Shuuniichido Classmate wo Kau Hanashi: Futari no Jikan, Iiwake no Gosen Yen

Once a week, Miyagi pays 5,000 yen to her classmate Sendai to buy three hours of Sendai’s time, which allows Miyagi to give her orders. Miyagi is at the bottom of the school caste while Sendai is at the top. The two, who have nothing to do with each other at school, spend time together after school under this contract. Miyagi’s orders are determined by her mood that day, and Sendai cannot disobey. One day after school… Miyagi calls Sendai to her room and gives her an unusual order.
Comedy, Psychological, Romance, Slice of Life

After his father’s remarriage, Yuuta suddenly becomes stepsiblings with his classmate Saki. Yuuta isn’t great at talking to women, but as the two settle into a shared lifestyle, could their relationship blossom into something more?
(Source: Yen Press)
